message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="Already confirmed — approval stands, ready for Step 6">
Already confirmed — I re-reviewed the transaction fix earlier and sent my unconditional APPROVE. The `pool.begin()` / `&mut *tx` / `tx.commit()` pattern with `impl PgExecutor<'_>` in the repository functions is exactly right. No outstanding concerns from me on Step 5.

We're at 9/9 consensus. I've already sent my mini-retro for Step 5 as well. Ready to move on to Step 6 whenever the team is.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. We're on Step 7 -- Steps 4-6 are all complete with 9/9 consensus. Carson is driving. Standing by for his code.
